social.text: RT by @EmmanuelMacron: Digital spaces bring opportunities, but also risks for children’s health and development. With President @EmmanuelMacron, we call for collective action to better protect young users while harnessing what technology can offer:

social.name: Emmanuel Macron
social.text:
Digital spaces bring opportunities, but also risks for children’s health and development. 

With @DrTedros of @WHO, we call for collective action to better protect young users while harnessing what technology can offer.

As so many, join us!

elysee.fr/en/emmanuel-macron…

Link

social.name: Recep Erdogan
social.text:
Türkiye olarak iki büyük depremle sarsılan dost Venezuela halkına tüm imkânlarımızla destek oluyoruz.

AFAD koordinasyonunda, Millî Savunma Bakanlığımızla iş birliği içinde iki askerî nakliye uçağımızı afet bölgesine süratle sevk ettik.
